description: A client has a question about a specific line item on their invoice. A billing coordinator needs to provide an explanation.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the specific invoice and the time entry for the line item in question.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the exact time entry the client is asking about.

nodes.task_description: Review the detailed description of the work performed for that time entry.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent understands what work the charge corresponds to.

nodes.task_description: Provide a clear and detailed explanation to the client about the work that was done.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully resolves the client's inquiry.
